name: Mediterranean Kitchen Lentil Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Green Bell Pepper, seeded and membranes removed, coarsely chopped
6 Cloves Garlic, peeled and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring lentils and water to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, while preparing the vegetables.
2. Meanwhile, in a small frying pan, cook onions in 1/4 cup vegetable oil over medium heat.
3. When onions start to brown, about 10 minutes, add green pepper and cook together for about 2 minutes.
4. Add onion-pepper combination and remaining oil to lentils. Cook lentils for about 40 minutes. Season with salt; pepper, allspice, cumin, and cinnamon. Continue to cook, covered, stirring frequently for about 20 more minutes.
5. Blend garlic with 1/4 cup vegetable oil in a blender or mortar and pestle until pureed and well blended.
6. When lentils are tender, add cilantro. Turn off heat. Then add garlic-oil puree. Stir well.
7. After a minute, add lemon juice. Taste and correct seasonings if necessary. Serve immediately.
